name: the short signal ci does not match inside certification or accreditation so CI/CD does not misfire
command: T=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "an AI certification and accreditation platform" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'puts (JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]["workload_types"]).join(",")'); ! echo "$T" | grep -qE 'ci-cd' && echo ci-not-in-certification 1>&2
